message:
chore(test-infra): add artifact retention policy for test gate outputs

Define retention categories and lifetimes for CI/test artifacts produced
by the full suite gate and related test infrastructure:

- conformance-reports (ext_conformance/**, e2e_results/**, quarantine_*):
  30-day retention for conformance and end-to-end test outputs
- provider-test-artifacts (full_suite_gate/**, cross_platform_reports/**):
  30-day retention for provider gate results and cross-platform reports

This structured policy enables automated cleanup of stale test artifacts
without accidentally purging recent diagnostic data needed for debugging
CI failures or provider regressions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+{
+  "artifact_categories": [
+    {
+      "includes": [
+        "ext_conformance/**",
+        "e2e_results/**",
+        "quarantine_*"
+      ],
+      "name": "conformance-reports",
+      "retention_days": 30
+    },
+    {
+      "includes": [
+        "full_suite_gate/**",
+        "cross_platform_reports/**"
+      ],
+      "name": "provider-test-artifacts",
+      "retention_days": 30
+    },
+    {
+      "includes": [
+        "e2e_results/ci-shards/<shard>/"
+      ],
+      "name": "ci-shard-*",
+      "retention_days": 30
+    },
+    {
+      "includes": [
+        "llvm-cov-summary.txt",
+        "lcov.info",
+        "llvm-cov/html"
+      ],
+      "name": "coverage",
+      "retention_days": 90
+    }
+  ],
+  "bead": "bd-3uqg.8.11",
+  "ci_workflow": {
+    "artifact_upload_steps": 10,
+    "explicit_retention_30d": 3,
+    "test_path_references": 14
+  },
+  "documentation": {
+    "auth_troubleshooting": "docs/provider-auth-troubleshooting.md",
+    "ci_operator_runbook": "docs/ci-operator-runbook.md",
+    "qa_runbook": "docs/qa-runbook.md",
+    "testing_policy": "docs/testing-policy.md"
+  },
+  "generated_at": "2026-02-14T02:28:47.708084147+00:00",
+  "schema": "pi.ci.artifact_retention_report.v1",
+  "triage_artifacts": {
+    "evidence_contract": "tests/e2e_results/<ts>/evidence_contract.json",
+    "failure_digest": "tests/e2e_results/<ts>/<suite>/failure_digest.json",
+    "failure_timeline": "tests/e2e_results/<ts>/<suite>/failure_timeline.jsonl",
+    "replay_bundle": "tests/full_suite_gate/replay_bundle.json"
+  }
+}
\ No newline at end of file
